headline: BlackRock’s Digital ETF Push Amid Private Credit Strains Could Be A Game Changer For BlackRock (BLK)
summary: In recent days, BlackRock has launched the iShares Staked Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHB), expanded its iBonds and leveraged-loan ETF line-up, and faced heightened redemption limits, legal scrutiny, and investor concern around its private credit funds. The contrast between BlackRock’s push into higher-fee digital and fixed-income products and the strain in its private credit vehicles highlights how product innovation and liquidity risks can coexist within the same asset manager. We’ll now examine...

headline: BlackRock (BLK) Valuation Checked As Private Credit Withdrawal Limits Stir Sector Concerns
summary: BlackRock (BLK) is under pressure after limiting withdrawals at a major private credit fund. This move, along with similar steps at peers and a new legal probe, has sharpened concerns about private credit risks. See our latest analysis for BlackRock. BlackRock's latest private credit headlines come after a weak patch for the shares, with the 30 day share price return of 11.97% and year to date share price return of 13.07% both negative, even though the 3 year total shareholder return of...

headline: Private Credit Funds Have Started Throttling Redemptions. Scaramucci’s SkyBridge Has Done It for Years.
summary: SkyBridge Capital has been able to satisfy only a fraction of redemption requests as investors mobbed the exits in the last few years.
